findings.description: The knowledge file describes 12 character type columns in the test case table, but the source RST table defines only 11 distinct character types (半角英字, 半角数字, 半角記号, 半角カナ, 全角英字, 全角数字, 全角ひらがな, 全角カタカナ, 全角漢字, 全角記号その他, 外字). The number 12 appears to have been inferred from the test execution observation table, which contains a duplicate 半角数字 row (likely a typo in the source). This is not the correct count for the test case table columns.
findings.source_evidence: Source test case table lists 11 character type rows ending with 外字. The observation table in the test method section shows 12 rows because 半角数字 appears twice consecutively.

findings.location: section: charset-length-test-method — 最小文字列長・最長文字列長の観点
findings.description: The knowledge file omits the note that for min-length and max-length tests, input values are composed of character types marked with `o` in the test case table (「入力値は、o印を付けた文字種で構成される。」). This is decision-necessary because users need to know that the character type selection (o/x columns) affects not only the character type validation tests but also the string length validation tests.
findings.source_evidence: Source observation table備考 column for 最小文字列 and 最長文字列 rows: 「入力値は、o印を付けた文字種で構成される。」

findings.location: section: single-validation-test-case-table — input1カラムの注釈
findings.description: The knowledge file omits the footnote that special_notation_in_cell notation can be used for efficiently creating input values. Source says `:ref:`special_notation_in_cell` の記法を使用することで、効率的に入力値を作成できる。` This is useful information for users constructing test data.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote [#] for input1 column: 「:ref:`special_notation_in_cell`\の記法を使用することで、効率的に入力値を作成できる。」

findings.description: The hint `underLimitMessageId` is missing. This property name appears in the messageIdWhenInvalidLength default value table (used when max > min and input is below minimum length) and is a concrete configuration property users might search for.
findings.source_evidence: Source messageIdWhenInvalidLength footnote table: 「maxAndMinMessageId（超過時）、underLimitMessageId（不足時）」
